headline: Five Hoxhunt Customers Win Prestigious CSO Awards for Innovation in Human Risk Management
summary: Hoxhunt, the leading Human Risk Management platform, today announced that five of its customers – Uber, Monster Energy, Docusign, LyondellBasell, and Copart – have each been recognized with a prestigious CSO Award in 2026 for their outstanding work in securing the human element of cybersecurity. The CSO Awards recognize exceptional security leaders and projects demonstrating innovation, leadership, and measurable business value in cybersecurity. Each award‑winning program was developed in partne
